results.rendered_html: duvasy (von 1. duvas), duvasyati gaṇa kaṇḍvādi zu  P. 3,1,27 . ehren, anerkennen, belohnen  NAIGH. 3,5 .  NIR. 10,20 . namasyata havyadātiṃ svadhvaraṃ duvasyata damyaṃ jātavedasam  ṚV. 3,2,8 . agnirha devā~ amṛto duvasyati 3,1 . samidbhiragniṃ namasā duvasyan 1,2 . 13 . 13,3 . 1,62,10 . 167,6 . 5,28,6 . 42,11 . 6,15,6 . 16,46 . 8,44,1 . sūktairdevaṃ savitāraṃ duvasya 5,49,2 . 10,14,1 . kṣemeṇa mitro varuṇaṃ duvasyati 7,82,5 . 1,78,2 . anehasa stubha indro duvasyati 3,51,3 . (ūtibhiḥ) yābhirvittajāniṃ duvasyathaḥ 1,112,15 . yābhiḥ kṛśānumasane duvasyathaḥ 21. yuvaṃ pedave spṛdhāṃ śvetaṃ tarutāraṃ duvasyathaḥ verehren so v. a. zur Belohnung geben 119 . 10 .
